data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an override option for preferred clients to see full availability. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the override option but lacks specific evidence of its operational status, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the override option for preferred clients.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
